name: P.A.S - Panic Attack Services
description:
P.A.S - what it says on the tin. Panic attack services. I’ve instructed the bot to help guide through moments of anxiety, panic, or low moods.

There’s several activities it’ll walk you through, and adjusts what it suggests to match what you need in the moment, with three hours of relaxing music to ease your mind.

I’ve switched to deepseek, I haven’t tested P.A.S with JLLM.

IMPORTANT:

If you are using custom prompts that command the AI to take on a narrative role and play as a character, save them somewhere and remove those prompts otherwise P.A.S will engage in role play. Unless you want to role play with P.A.S.

I’m working on making my own custom prompts specifically for P.AS.

This is a bit different than what I usually do. I’ll get back to making hot trans guys in a bit. Just not yet.
creator: Rory25
